caption: In a spacious, high-ceilinged hall with neutral-colored walls and a large chandelier, several people are practicing martial arts on a blue floor. A woman in a bright yellow outfit is the central figure, holding a long staff. She is accompanied by others, including two men wearing blue uniforms and a woman in a light blue shirt and trousers. In the background, an audience is seated, watching the demonstration. As the sequence progresses, the participants move in coordinated motions. The woman in yellow shifts her stance and maneuvers her staff, while the man in blue on the right side of the frame advances toward her, wielding his own staff. The other participants maintain various ready stances and follow the flow of the choreographed movements. The lighting remains consistent, and the focus remains on the dynamic interactions and precise movements of the martial artists throughout the scene.
